intentSynonyms: permanently delete an event in outlook
delete or cancel an event in outlook
description: Delete or cancel a calendar event. For a meeting you organize, provide a cancellation_message to send a cancellation notice to all attendees. Without a cancellation_message the event is simply removed from your calendar.

event_id.description: The event ID to delete or cancel

cancellation_message.description: When set and you are the organizer, sends this cancellation note to attendees instead of a silent delete.
